mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'PREVIEW_CREATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS create_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'PREVIEW_OPENED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS open_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'PREVIEW_FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS failed_count, COUNT(*) AS all_preview_requests, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED') THEN preview_key END) AS unique_link_count FROM stats_event WHERE occurred_at >= #{start} AND occurred_at < #{end} AND event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED', 'PREVIEW_FAILED')

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d', occurred_at / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS day_bucket, event_type, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM stats_event WHERE occurred_at >= #{start} AND occurred_at < #{end} AND event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED') GROUP BY day_bucket, event_type ORDER BY day_bucket ASC

SELECT COALESCE(error_code, 'OTHER') AS error_code, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM stats_event WHERE occurred_at >= #{start} AND occurred_at < #{end} AND event_type = 'PREVIEW_FAILED' GROUP BY COALESCE(error_code, 'OTHER')

SELECT link.preview_key, link.title, link.canonical_url, link.provider_id, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event.event_type = 'PREVIEW_CREATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS created_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event.event_type = 'PREVIEW_OPENED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS opened_count, link.first_seen_at, link.last_seen_at FROM stats_link link JOIN stats_event event ON event.preview_key = link.preview_key WHERE event.occurred_at >= #{start} AND event.occurred_at < #{end} AND event.event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED') GROUP BY link.preview_key, link.title, link.canonical_url, link.provider_id, link.first_seen_at, link.last_seen_at ORDER BY opened_count DESC, created_count DESC, link.last_seen_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CAST(strftime('%w', occurred_at / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS weekday, CAST(strftime('%H', occurred_at / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS INTEGER) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM stats_event WHERE occurred_at >= #{start} AND occurred_at < #{end} AND event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED') GROUP BY weekday, hour ORDER BY weekday ASC, hour ASC

WITH daily_links AS ( SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d', event.occurred_at / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS day_bucket, event.preview_key, strftime('%Y-%m-%d', link.first_seen_at / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS first_seen_day FROM stats_event event JOIN stats_link link ON link.preview_key = event.preview_key WHERE event.occurred_at >= #{start} AND event.occurred_at < #{end} AND event.event_type IN ('PREVIEW_CREATED', 'PREVIEW_OPENED') AND event.preview_key IS NOT NULL GROUP BY day_bucket, event.preview_key ) SELECT day_bucket, SUM(CASE WHEN first_seen_day = day_bucket THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_link_count, SUM(CASE WHEN first_seen_day < day_bucket THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returning_link_count FROM daily_links GROUP BY day_bucket ORDER BY day_bucket ASC
